title: Spatial transcriptomics of Selaginella moellendorfii roots
author: Yang, Xilan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Locations of RNA molecules of 108 genes in 90 Selaginella moellendorfii roots, recorded 0 or 3 days after the first bifurcation.
steps_raw: Locations of RNA molecules of 108 genes in 90 Selaginella moellendorfii roots, recorded 0 or 3 days after the first bifurcation.
